intro: Denisophytum buchii is a plant species native to South Africa, commonly known as the "African Milk Tree" or "Doringkruis". The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Denisophytum buchii include iridoids, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
